questions.text: Which AWS service is best suited for object storage of static assets?
questions.explanation: Amazon S3 is designed for object storage and is ideal for static assets.

questions.text: A workload requires millisecond latency for key-value access at massive scale. Which service?
questions.explanation: DynamoDB is a fully managed key-value NoSQL database designed for single-digit millisecond performance at any scale.

questions.text: Which service can be used to distribute content globally with low latency?
questions.explanation: CloudFront is a CDN that caches content at edge locations for low-latency delivery.
